title: hypericum jankae
intro: Hypericum jankae, also known as the Janka's St. John's Wort, is a flowering plant species in the Hypericum genus. It is native to the Balkan Peninsula and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial effects. The plant's health benefits include reducing anxiety and stress, improving mood, and aiding in wound healing. Hypericum jankae can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or oil, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
